data.current_summary: Most Emailed by Section & Time Period
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve most emailed articles by section and time period
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of the most emailed New York Times articles for a specified section and time period. Accepts section name (e.g., 'world', 'business') and time period (1, 7, or 30 days) as path parameters. Returns an array of articles ranked by email share count, with each article including metadata such as title, URL, byline, publication date, and email share statistics. Requires API key authentication.

data.current_summary: Retrieve most viewed articles by section and time period
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of the most viewed New York Times articles for a specified section and time period. Accepts section name (e.g., 'world', 'business') and time period (1, 7, or 30 days) as path parameters.
